task_completion.description: Verify the destination is set to Kabul.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The search bar, destination field, or route planner in the Sygic app clearly displays 'Kabul' as the target destination.

task_completion.description: Verify the starting point of the route is set to Jalalabad.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The starting point field in the route planner displays 'Jalalabad', or the map overview explicitly shows the route originating from Jalalabad.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent searches for a petrol/gas station along the planned route.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The screen shows a search query for fuel (e.g., 'Gas', 'Petrol', 'Station') or the selection of the 'petrol stations' POI category, specifically utilizing the 'Places along route' or 'Places on route' feature.

task_completion.description: Verify a petrol station is selected and added to the route as an intermediate stop.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A specific petrol station from the search results is selected, and an action to add it to the route (e.g., 'Add as waypoint', 'Add stop', or a '+' icon) is visible or has been executed.

task_completion.description: Verify the final state shows the active route overview with the gas station included as a stop before reaching Kabul.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The final screen displays the route overview map or itinerary list. It must clearly show the route starting at Jalalabad, ending at Kabul, with a petrol station icon or list entry present as an intermediate waypoint between the two cities.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Sygic GPS Navigation application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the genuine Sygic GPS Navigation app interface (com.sygic.aura), not a web browser, text editor, or generic maps app.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the graphical user interface to plan the route.
integrity.visual_evidence: The route, search, and waypoints were configured via on-screen UI elements (search bars, buttons, map taps, menus) rather than being injected via terminal commands or scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the map displays authentic geographic data for the requested region.
integrity.visual_evidence: The map displays realistic geographic features, road networks, and distances for the Jalalabad to Kabul region (~155 km), rather than a blank, mocked, or spoofed map interface.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The destination is Kabul. Sygic categorizes fuel stations as 'petrol stations' and supports full-text search for keywords like 'Gas', 'Petrol', 'Station', 'Pump', or 'Oil'. The app features a 'Places along route' (or 'Places on route') option to filter POIs during navigation. The route from Jalalabad to Kabul is geographically valid and approximately 155 km by road.
